creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
/usr/ports/distinfo is wrong. Perhaps it wasn't updated when the new location for the distfile was found, or whatever, but I was unhappy about forcing a failed md5sum, so I checked the official site, found the md5 for the tar, and checked against that, so I found my own md5sum and SHA256 for them...

Here's the correct distinfo contents:

MD5 (hdf5-1.6.5.tar.gz) = 67187b3253b89f1f41756b7fd4396ecf

SHA256 (hdf5-1.6.5.tar.gz) = 85b7cfc1e34db544fa93f5bf7effe189a5e1eb97f0cfa7b212adc11915a756b2
SIZE (hdf5-1.6.5.tar.gz) = 4930666


Perhaps someone could commit this please...

Fix: 

Here's the correct distinfo contents:

MD5 (hdf5-1.6.5.tar.gz) = 67187b3253b89f1f41756b7fd4396ecf

SHA256 (hdf5-1.6.5.tar.gz) = 85b7cfc1e34db544fa93f5bf7effe189a5e1eb97f0cfa7b212adc11915a756b2
SIZE (hdf5-1.6.5.tar.gz) = 4930666


Perhaps someone could commit this please...

Sorry, I'm not sure how to get diffs
How-To-Repeat: Try to fetch and compile science/hdf5
